tools.name: v1.changePassword
tools.description:
Notes:
  • Password set is only supported by API Resellers setting subaccount passwords.
  • **shopperId** is **not the same** as **customerId**. **shopperId** is a number of max length 10 digits (*ex:* 1234567890) whereas **customerId** is a UUIDv4 (*ex:* 295e3bc3-b3b9-4d95-aae5-ede41a994d13)

tools.name: v1.createSubaccount
tools.description: Create a Subaccount owned by the authenticated Reseller

tools.name: v1.delete
tools.description:
Notes:
  • Shopper deletion is not supported in OTE
  • **shopperId** is **not the same** as **customerId**. **shopperId** is a number of max length 10 digits (*ex:* 1234567890) whereas **customerId** is a UUIDv4 (*ex:* 295e3bc3-b3b9-4d95-aae5-ede41a994d13)

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
